CREATE VIEW daily_notes AS
SELECT
  path,
  title,
  SUBSTR(path_basename(path), 1, 10) as date,
  size,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks t WHERE t.path = n.path) as task_count
FROM notes n
WHERE path LIKE 'Daily/%'
  OR path LIKE 'Journal/%'
ORDER BY date DESC

CREATE VIEW weekly_summary AS
SELECT
  strftime('%Y-W%W', SUBSTR(path_basename(path), 1, 10)) as week,
  COUNT(*) as entries,
  SUM(size) as total_size
FROM notes
WHERE path LIKE 'Daily/%'
GROUP BY week
ORDER BY week DESC

FROM notes
WHERE path LIKE 'Daily/%'
GROUP BY week
ORDER BY week DESC

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 索引时将跳过大小超过此值（单位：KB）的文件。默认为 1000 KB（1 MB）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to store the database. Disk storage persists between sessions. Memory storage is faster but requires re-indexing on startup.
ast.target: 选择数据库的存储方式。磁盘存储在会话间持久化。内存存储更快，但启动时需要重新索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: These features use Obsidian's metadata cache without loading the entire file.
ast.target: 这些功能使用 Obsidian 的元数据缓存，无需加载整个文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Index frontmatter properties. Also creates a notes_with_properties view where each property key becomes a column.
ast.target: 索引 frontmatter 属性。同时会创建一个 notes_with_properties 视图，其中每个属性键成为一列。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Index Markdown headings (h1-h6) into structured data.
ast.target: 将 Markdown 标题（h1-h6）索引为结构化数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 索引笔记间的内部链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 索引笔记中发现的标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Index bulleted and numbered list items. Excludes task items (use Index tasks for those).
ast.target: 索引项目符号和编号列表项。不包括任务项（请使用“索引任务”功能）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: These features require loading the full content of each note, which may impact performance on large vaults.
ast.target: 这些功能需要加载每个笔记的完整内容，可能会影响大型知识库的性能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include the full text content of notes in the database. Disabling this will also disable tables and tasks indexing.
ast.target: 在数据库中包含笔记的完整文本内容。禁用此选项也会同时禁用表格和任务索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Parse Markdown tables into structured data. When enabled, each table cell becomes queryable, and tables can be referenced by their position or the heading above them.
ast.target: 将 Markdown 表格解析为结构化数据。启用后，每个表格单元格都可查询，并且可以通过其位置或上方的标题来引用表格。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically create simplified SQL views for each unique table structure. Requires "Index tables" to be enabled. A full reindex is needed for changes to take effect.
ast.target: 为每种独特的表格结构自动创建简化的 SQL 视图。需要启用“索引表格”。更改生效需要完全重建索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Parse Markdown tasks (checkboxes) into structured data. When enabled, tasks become queryable with metadata like completion status, priority, due dates, and tags.
ast.target: 将 Markdown 任务（复选框）解析为结构化数据。启用后，任务变得可查询，并带有完成状态、优先级、截止日期和标签等元数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Files and folders matching these patterns will not be indexed. Use regular expressions like \.tmp$ or ^temp/ or archive/
ast.target: 匹配这些模式的文件和文件夹将不会被索引。使用正则表达式，如 \\.tmp$ 或 ^temp/ 或 archive/。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow inline SQL buttons using the syntax `vq[Label]{SQL}`. Buttons execute SQL immediately without preview. SELECT queries copy results to clipboard. Requires "Enable write operations" to be on.
ast.target: 允许使用 `vq[Label]{SQL}` 语法的内联 SQL 按钮。按钮会立即执行 SQL，无需预览。SELECT 查询会将结果复制到剪贴板。需要启用“允许写入操作”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Minimum time between button clicks in milliseconds. Increase if edits are being lost due to rapid button clicks. Default is 500ms.
ast.target: 按钮点击之间的最小时间间隔（毫秒）。如果因快速点击按钮导致编辑丢失，请增加此值。默认为 500 毫秒。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow DELETE FROM notes to delete files from the vault. This is a destructive operation. Files are moved to trash, not permanently deleted.
ast.target: 允许使用 DELETE FROM notes 从知识库中删除文件。这是一个破坏性操作。文件将被移至回收站，而非永久删除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow vaultquery-function blocks to register user-authored JavaScript functions for SQL queries.
ast.target: 允许 vaultquery-function 代码块注册用户编写的 JavaScript 函数，用于 SQL 查询。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow vaultquery blocks to execute user-authored JavaScript rendering code from template sections.
ast.target: 允许 vaultquery 代码块执行来自模板部分的用户编写的 JavaScript 渲染代码。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow vaultquery-trigger code blocks to register database triggers that can automatically modify files. Triggers can set properties, rename notes, and replace content when data changes.
ast.target: 允许 vaultquery-trigger 代码块注册数据库触发器，这些触发器可以在数据更改时自动修改文件。触发器可以设置属性、重命名笔记和替换内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow third-party plugins to register third-party provider tables, discover provider definition code blocks, and refresh provider rows for SQL queries.
ast.target: 允许第三方插件注册第三方提供者表、发现提供者定义代码块，并为 SQL 查询刷新提供者行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how note content is displayed in query results. Plain text is recommended because rendered Markdown can recurse when a query returns the current note.
ast.target: 选择查询结果中笔记内容的显示方式。推荐使用纯文本，因为当查询返回当前笔记时，渲染的 Markdown 可能会导致递归。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically refresh query results when files are indexed. Keeps results up-to-date but may impact performance on large vaults with frequent changes.
ast.target: 文件被索引时自动刷新查询结果。保持结果最新，但可能会影响大型知识库在频繁更改时的性能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of rows to show in vaultquery-view block previews. Set to 0 to disable previews.
ast.target: 在 vaultquery-view 代码块预览中显示的行数。设置为 0 可禁用预览。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls how the SQLite WebAssembly binary is loaded. Auto uses a local file when present and falls back to sql.js.org. Local only never uses the network. CDN only always downloads from sql.js.org.
ast.target: 控制 SQLite WebAssembly 二进制文件的加载方式。自动模式在本地文件存在时使用，否则回退到 sql.js.org。仅本地模式从不使用网络。仅 CDN 模式始终从 sql.js.org 下载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Saves a CDN-loaded SQL.js WASM binary to the plugin folder for later local loading.
ast.target: 将通过 CDN 加载的 SQL.js WASM 二进制文件保存到插件文件夹，以便后续本地加载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional path to sql-wasm.wasm. Empty uses the plugin folder. Absolute paths and vault-relative paths are supported.
ast.target: sql-wasm.wasm 的可选路径。留空则使用插件文件夹。支持绝对路径和相对于知识库的路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run initial indexing in a background thread to keep the UI responsive. After indexing completes, switches to main thread for fast queries. Requires restart to take effect.
ast.target: 在后台线程中运行初始索引，以保持 UI 响应。索引完成后，切换到主线程以进行快速查询。需要重启才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
